Video.summary: Straight from The Orchard at Jigsaw Health, Tuesday Night Pickleball brings you a high-octane women’s doubles matchup featuring four elite pros. Anna Bright and Jessie Irvine team up with firepower and finesse to take on the seasoned duo of Lucy Kovalova and Catherine Parenteau.From smart stacking and sharp cross-court dinks to quick hands battles and momentum swings, this match is packed with elite-level tactics and crowd-thrilling rallies. It’s classic TNP: fun, fiery, and full of flair.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea
Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea
Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea

Video.title: Golden Tate and Eric Decker

Image.alt: Golden Tate and Eric Decker
Golden Tate and Eric Decker
Golden Tate and Eric Decker

Video.summary: The 2023 English Open Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final brings serious heat as Ryler DeHeart and Megan Fudge square off against Nick Petterson and Susannah Barr. This final showcases elite shot-making, smart stacking strategies, and seamless teamwork from both sides of the net.With momentum shifting and nerves running high, every rally counts. From laser-focused drives to perfectly timed poaches, this match is a clinic in competitive mixed doubles and a thrilling conclusion to the Open division.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Video.summary: Molly Carter and Kim Kesner take on Diane Wainio and Karin Kochis in this Women's Senior Pro Backdraw Semifinal.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, watch a thrilling collegiate pickleball battle between Purdue University and Creighton University. Tied at 2-2 entering the broadcast, this match features intense mixed doubles action that decides the series.Key matchups include Purdue’s Emma Jones and Jay Barath facing off against Creighton’s Russell Lee and Lucy. Later, Purdue’s Caleb Young and Tammy Lamb take on Creighton’s Noah Wodzinski and Elizabeth Cook.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach at the NCPA Virginia Regional 2025, the University of Virginia (UVA) faces off against High Point University in a crucial pool play match. With a bid to the National Championship in St. Louis on the line, these teams battle through a best-of-seven format.The episode kicks off with Women's Singles featuring Alexandra McDonald (UVA) and Sushi Bandaru (High Point), followed by an intense Men's Singles showdown between Eric Lee (UVA) and High Point's wild card, Freddy Ortmann. The action heats up in Men's Doubles with Cooper Duncan joining Ortmann, and Aiden Eggleston partnering with Lee. Watch for strategic mixed doubles play and see if High Point can force a sudden death dreambreaker.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Video.summary: The Boca Raton Picklers face off against the Oklahoma City Punishers in a men's match.
Video.title: NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mens)

Image.alt: NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mens)
NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mens)
NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mens)

Video.summary: We are live from the Barnes Tennis Center in San Diego, California, for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This thrilling collegiate team match features Grand Canyon University (GCU) taking on the University of Hawaii. The broadcast picks up in the heat of the action during a crucial mixed doubles game, with GCU leading. Watch as the match extends into a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7) to decide the winner. The episode highlights the unique collegiate format where every point counts towards seeding for the National Championship. Key players include Hawaii's Tristan Simmons and Tama, battling against GCU's Tanner and Hannah. The match concludes with a high-stakes finish that determines who moves forward in bracket play.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Video.summary: In the finals of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, the Fort Myers Flamingos and the GMV Chomp go head-to-head. The commentators, including Angel, highlight the youth and fire of Fort Myers player Jade and the consistent dominance of the number one women's team, the GMV Chomp. The match is a best-of-three, rally-scoring format with games to 21. The episode showcases impressive plays from Stevie and Kelsey, and praises Heather Nobler's "nasty" two-handed backhand. The commentators also discuss the challenge for the team coming out of pool number two, which has less rest time before the finals.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial tie between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs. The commentary team sets the stage for a tense match, which is determined by an incredibly close final scoreline and points difference, with all six teams still in the running for the four semi-final spots. Also witness the Exhibition Match of the Century featuring Bollywood superstars Aamir Ali (Team Aamir) and Ali Fazal (Team Ali), live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Video.summary: In Game 6 of the AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court, the Sarasota Manatees take on the Saint Pete Icebergs. The Manatees jump to a commanding lead, while the commentators highlight new Icebergs player Mandy Gabriel.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 6 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Saint Pete Icebergs

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 6 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Saint Pete Icebergs

Video.summary: Megan Fudge and Karin Kochis take on Ryann Foster and Lee Whitwell in this Women's Split Pro Doubles semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: This Pro Women's Doubles match at the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships features the dynamic team of Anna Leigh Waters and Lee Waters facing off against the formidable duo of Walczak and Harris. The Waters team, known for their aggressive play and powerful shots, including Anna Leigh's unique heavy topspin cross-court backhand roll, aim to dominate the court. Walczak, a native of Poland with collegiate tennis experience, and Harris seek to overcome the Waters' early lead and challenge their expected path to the Championship court.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Video.summary: October 4, 2022 - Live from The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health, it's Tuesday Night Pickleball
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - October 4 2022 - All-stars Women's Doubles

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball - October 4 2022 - All-stars Women's Doubles
Tuesday Night Pickleball - October 4 2022 - All-stars Women's Doubles
Tuesday Night Pickleball - October 4 2022 - All-stars Women's Doubles

Video.summary: Experience the pinnacle of collegiate pickleball as Virginia Tech and Liberty University battle for the NCPA 2025 Virginia Beach Regional title. This high-stakes championship matchup features a prize pool of $2,500 and a chance for regional dominance.The action kicks off with an elite men’s doubles match featuring Liberty’s Ben Rice and Derek Cray against Virginia Tech’s undefeated Cody Miller and Caelan Funk. The broadcast also captures intense singles play and critical mixed doubles rallies as both teams fight through high-tension dink battles and "Dreambreaker" level strategy. Watch for standout defensive plays, including ATP (Around the Post) attempts and high-speed hand battles on the Championship Court at Pickleball Virginia Beach.
Video.title: Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University

Image.alt: Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University
Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University
Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University

Video.summary: Live from The Picklr in Noblesville, this NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 matchup features a critical battle between the University of Wisconsin-Madison and Purdue University. With eight national bids and $5,000 in prize money on the line, the stakes are high as the 16th-seeded Purdue takes on the 17th-seeded Wisconsin in a best-of-seven format.The match kicks off with Gender Doubles, where Wisconsin’s duo of Noah and Sarah Sowinski showcase dominant net play and quick hands against Purdue’s Caleb Yang and Trevor Ju. Watch for standout moments, including an incredible Ernie from Wisconsin and strategic adjustments in the Mixed Doubles games involving Colton Thielman and Elena Schlichte.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Video.summary: Check out these US Open Pickleball Championship 2023 highlights!
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.
Video.title: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Image.alt: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Video.summary: Dylan Frazier and Ritchie Tuazon meet Irina Tereschenko and Connor Pardoe in a high-stakes mixed doubles match at Picklebowl 2023. Set against the backdrop of this annual charity event, the match features four seasoned competitors known for their precision, quick reflexes, and court awareness. Expect fast-paced exchanges, smart teamwork, and big momentum swings as both teams battle for bragging rights and a good cause. Blending professional play with the spirited energy of Picklebowl, this match is a crowd favorite you won’t want to miss.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Video.summary: In the exciting championship match of Picklebowl 2023, pro pickleball player Kyle Yates teams up with Picklebowl host and former NFL quarterback Danny Wuerffel to challenge the fierce duo of Anna Bright, a top female pro and former collegiate tennis star, and Ameen Hafez. This charity event brings together athletes and celebrities representing their alma maters in a competitive battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Dave Fleming and special guest Marcellus Wiley highlights the skill, strategy, and drama on court. Watch intense rallies, strategic plays, and hear insider insights as these top players compete for the title. Don’t miss the dynamic energy and social spirit of pickleball in this must-see final.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez

Video.summary: Indiana’s Safdar faces Clemson’s Bozzetto in the 2024 DUPR National Championship Women’s Singles Final, battling for collegiate pickleball supremacy in a best-of-three format.
Video.title: Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson

Image.alt: Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson
Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson
Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson
